chapter_title.en: The Prayer of Sitting and Glorification, Which is the Prayer of ja'far Ibn Abi Talib

text: 1537 - وَ سُئِلَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: عَمَّنْ صَلَّى صَلاَةَ جَعْفَرٍ هَلْ يُكْتَبُ لَهُ مِنَ اَلْأَجْرِ مِثْلُ مَا قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ لِجَعْفَرٍ قَالَ «إِي وَ اَللَّهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1537 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) was asked about someone who performs the Salat of Ja'far. Would they receive the same reward as that which the Messenger of Allah (sw) mentioned to Ja'far?
Imam (as) said: "Yes, by Allah (swt)."
